summary: User Management features testing complete - Backend APIs 100% pass (16/16 tests), Frontend UI fully functional after bug fix

ui_bugs.issue: BUG FIXED: Missing Permissions and Reset Password buttons in user table Actions column
ui_bugs.resolution: Added missing buttons, dialogs, and handler functions to UserManagementNew.js

critical_code_review_comments: App was using UserManagementNew.js instead of UserManagement.js - the new file was missing Permissions and Reset Password features

Fixed by adding: state variables (permissionsDialogOpen, passwordDialogOpen, selectedUser, etc.), handler functions (openPermissionsDialog, openPasswordDialog, updateUserPermissions, resetUserPassword), and UI dialogs with proper checkboxes for permissions
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/UserManagementNew.js - Added Permissions and Reset Password buttons, modals, and functionality
/app/backend/tests/test_user_management.py - Created new test file for user management APIs
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_User for testing during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Management features fully tested. All 3 super admin actions working: 1) Toggle Active/Deactivate - toggles user.is_active status, 2) Edit Permissions - opens modal with checkboxes organized by category (orders, order_fields, payments, management, delivery), saves via PATCH /api/users/{id}/permissions, 3) Reset Password - opens modal with password input, min 6 char validation, saves via PATCH /api/users/{id}/password. Backend has 16 pytest tests covering all CRUD operations and edge cases. One frontend bug was fixed: UserManagementNew.js was missing Permissions and Reset Password buttons.
features_verified: Super admin login with admin@usbakers.com / admin123 - WORKING
Navigate to Users page (/users route) - WORKING
User table shows all users with Name, Email, Phone, Outlet, Permissions count, Status, Actions columns - WORKING
Toggle Active/Deactivate button - WORKING (toggles between Activate/Deactivate text, updates user.is_active)
Permissions button - WORKING (opens modal with checkboxes organized by category)
Permissions modal shows all 5 categories: Orders, Order Fields, Payments, Management, Delivery - WORKING
Save Permissions - WORKING (updates user permissions via API)
Reset Password button - WORKING (opens modal with password input)
Reset Password validation - WORKING (button disabled when password < 6 chars)
Reset Password save - WORKING (shows success message, password updated via API)
Backend API: GET /api/permissions/available - WORKING (returns all permission categories)

frontend_bug.symptom: Permissions and Reset Password buttons not visible in User Management page Actions column
frontend_bug.root_cause: App.js routes /users to UserManagementNew.js instead of UserManagement.js. UserManagementNew.js only had the toggle active button, missing Permissions and Reset Password features.
frontend_bug.fix: Added missing state variables, handler functions, buttons, and dialog modals to UserManagementNew.js
